description: Canon Korea is the Korean website for Canon’s cameras, printers, imaging devices, and related support services. It includes product information, customer support, and region-specific application pages for camera SDK/API access.
summary: kr.canon publicly documents Canon digital camera developer offerings: an HTTP-based Camera Control API and downloadable camera SDKs, both gated behind a Korea-region application/approval process; no public OpenAPI/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface was found on this domain.

surfaces.name: Canon Digital Camera Camera Control API
Canon Digital Camera SDK downloads (EDSDK / RAW Develop / PowerShot G7 X Mark II SDK)
